title: Bending Poses (Elementals Addon)
description: Bending Poses is an addon for the Elementals mod that adds custom  poses when casting.
body:
# **Bending Poses (Elementals Addon)**

**Adds custom bending animations to the Elementals mod.**

> **Required:** Elementals (by Saperate), Player Animation Library

---

<details>
<summary>Planned Features</summary>

- Poses for Waterbending
- Pose Reworks

</details>


---

## 🔧 Known Issues (Alpha)

- None for now

---

## 📜 Credits

- **Saperate** – Creator of Elementals

---

free to use in modpacks, credit appreciated but not required

---

## **Disclaimer:** 

- Animations are added to better sync with abilities. If you're used to the fast pace of Elementals, this mod may feel slower or gameplay-changing due to the added timing and animations.
- For any questions feel free to join Sap's Discord server and @ me being (@powdred.png ) and report a bug in the #minecraft section.

Disc Link: https://discord.gg/vX84bpJvWz
